[2020-01-14 07:40] iminabearsuit: But in the end, I think putting focus on a loss streak just makes it worse for the player. And if you still really want a system for it, it should instead motivate to keep playing by making the win feel more rewarding than a normal win. Than to make the losses feel less bad.
